arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers relishing Celtic Champions League challenge as he gives Real Madrid or Bayern Munich draw reaction
arts.sum: It was a ding-dong clash with the Hoops now set to face one of two European giants to reach the last 16.

arts.ttl: Bellingham doubles Real Madrid's lead against Brest
arts.sum: England midfielder Jude Bellingham finishes off a swift Real Madrid counter-attack to put the European Champions 2-0 up away at Brest.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham nears Messi's Champions League record
arts.sum: After a slow start to the season, Jude Bellingham has rediscovered his form to showcase his unquestionable ability. The Englishman was a revelation during his first season in Spain,...

arts.ttl: Rodrygo's 'pinpoint finish' gives Real Madrid the lead against Brest
arts.sum: Real Madrid forward Rodrygo grabs his twelfth goal of the season with a clinical finish to open the scoring against Brest in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Brest 0-3 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Rodrygo shines but Los Blancos face a nightmare playoff
arts.sum: Real Madrid round off their Champions League league-phase campaign with a 3-0 success over Brest, but Carlo Ancelotti's side finish inside the playoff spots.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | Brest 0-3 Real Madrid: Clinical Champions League winners defeat Bretons
arts.sum: UEFA Champions League, Round 8, 29/01/25 Brest have ended their Champions League phase with a 3-0 home defeat against a clinical Real Madrid side. Jude Bellingham and a brace from…

arts.ttl: Bellingham scores as Real Madrid see off Brest
arts.sum: Real Madrid must go through the Champions League play-offs after failing to finish in the top eight despite comfortably beating Brest 3-0 on matchday eight of the group phase at the Stade du Roudourou.
